title: australian turkey neck grill
description: fresh and crunchy weeknight dish featuring turkey neck, perfect for a quick dinner
instructions: Heat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat
Season the turkey neck with salt, pepper, and paprika
Add the vegetable oil to the grill and sear the turkey neck for 2-3 minutes per side
Transfer the turkey neck to a baking sheet and roast in a preheated oven at 1801c for 20-25 minutes
Meanwhile, toss the sliced shallots in a bowl with a pinch of salt and a squeeze of lemon juice
After the turkey neck has roasted for 20 minutes, add the shallots to the grill and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally
Once the turkey neck is cooked through, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving
Serve the sliced turkey neck with the crispy shallots on top
Enjoy as a quick and easy weeknight dinner
This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner, as it can be cooked in under 30 minutes
The turkey neck is a great source of protein, making this dish high in protein
This dish is also low in carbs, making it a great option for those following a low-glycemic diet
The combination of the crispy shallots and the tender turkey neck is a match made in heaven
This dish is sure to become a new favorite, and is perfect for a quick and easy weeknight dinner
The turkey neck can be substituted with chicken or pork neck, if preferred
The shallots can be substituted with onions or garlic, if preferred
